extraction_reasoning: The litigation table has separate “By” and “Against” rows; all “By” rows were excluded. Against rows counted were: criminal—nil for the Company, Subsidiary, Directors and Promoters, giving 0; statutory/regulatory—1 against the Company and nil against the other listed entities, giving 1; tax—36 against the Company and 1 against the Subsidiary, giving 37, while the Promoters’ 12 tax matters were excluded from the company-group tax count. The quantified aggregate against the Company and Subsidiary is the stated ₹3,068.16 million plus ₹0.27 million, or ₹3,068.43 million = ₹306.843 crore; the Promoters’ ₹137.41 million was excluded. Contingent liabilities are disclosed as ₹1,926.07 million of income-tax matters plus ₹9.20 million of indirect-tax matters as at September 30, 2024; no numeric total row is shown, so these line items sum to ₹1,935.27 million = ₹193.527 crore. Company-wide customer concentration for the latest full fiscal period, Fiscal 2024, is 69.37% for the top five and 85.39% for the top ten, calculated as a percentage of revenue from operations; all litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ millions, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
